flow.name: list-orders-flow
flow.doc:name: List Orders Flow
flow.doc:description: Returns all orders from seeded mock data, optionally filtered by customerId query parameter

http:listener.doc:name: GET /orders
http:listener.doc:description: Receives GET requests to list orders, supports optional customerId query param filter

ee:transform.doc:name: Load and filter orders
ee:transform.doc:description: Reads all orders from mock data and filters by customerId if provided as a query parameter

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var allOrders = readUrl("classpath://mock-data/orders.json", "application/json") var customerIdFilter = attributes.queryParams.customerId default null --- if (customerIdFilter != null) allOrders filter ($.customerId == customerIdFilter) else allOrders

logger.doc:name: Log list orders
logger.doc:description: Logs the number of orders returned after filtering

flow.name: get-order-flow
flow.doc:name: Get Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Returns a single order record by ID from seeded mock data, or 404 if not found

http:listener.doc:name: GET /orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives GET requests to retrieve a specific order by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the orderId URI parameter into a flow variable

ee:transform.doc:name: Find order by ID
ee:transform.doc:description: Filters the orders mock data to find the order matching the requested ID

choice.doc:name: Order found?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the order ID exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Order ID does not match any seeded record

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the order was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order with ID '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 200 OK

logger.doc:name: Log get order
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the order lookup

flow.name: create-order-flow
flow.doc:name: Create Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Creates a new order record attached to a customer and returns the created resource with a generated ID

http:listener.doc:name: POST /orders
http:listener.doc:description: Receives POST requests to create a new order; expects customerId in request body

ee:transform.doc:name: Build created order response
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs the created order object with a generated ID, PENDING status, and timestamps

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import * from dw::core::UUID var now = now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"} --- { id: "o" ++ ((randomUUID() splitBy "-")[0]), customerId: payload.customerId, items: payload.items default [], total: (payload.items default [] reduce ((item, acc = 0.0) -> acc + (item.quantity * item.unitPrice) )) as Number {format: "0.00"}, status: "PENDING", createdAt: now, updatedAt: now }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 201 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 201 Created

logger.message: #['[orders-sys-api] POST /orders → created order ' ++ payload.id ++ ' for customer ' ++ payload.customerId]
logger.doc:name: Log create order
logger.doc:description: Logs the ID of the newly created order and its associated customer

flow.name: update-order-flow
flow.doc:name: Update Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Updates an existing order record by ID and returns the updated resource, or 404 if not found

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives PUT requests to update an existing order by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the orderId URI parameter into a flow variable

set-variable.doc:name: Store request payload
set-variable.doc:description: Preserves the incoming request payload before order lookup

ee:transform.doc:name: Check order exists
ee:transform.doc:description: Verifies the order ID exists in mock data before applying the update

choice.doc:name: Order exists?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the order ID to update exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Order ID does not exist, return 404

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the order to update was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order with ID '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:name: Found — apply update
otherwise.doc:description: Order exists, merge incoming fields and return updated record

ee:transform.doc:name: Merge update into order
ee:transform.doc:description: Merges the incoming request fields onto the existing order record, recalculating total if items changed

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var updatedItems = vars.requestPayload.items default payload.items --- { id: vars.orderId, customerId: payload.customerId, items: updatedItems, total: (updatedItems reduce ((item, acc = 0.0) -> acc + (item.quantity * item.unitPrice) )) as Number {format: "0.00"}, status: vars.requestPayload.status default payload.status, createdAt: payload.createdAt, updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"} }

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 200 OK

logger.doc:name: Log update order
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the order update operation

flow.name: cancel-order-flow
flow.doc:name: Cancel Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Sets an order's status to CANCELLED without deleting it. Returns 200 with updated order, or 404 if not found.

http:listener.doc:name: PATCH /orders/{orderId}/cancel
http:listener.doc:description: Receives PATCH requests to cancel an order by setting its status to CANCELLED

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the orderId URI parameter into a flow variable

ee:transform.doc:name: Find order to cancel
ee:transform.doc:description: Looks up the order by ID to verify it exists before cancelling

choice.doc:name: Order found?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the order to cancel exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Order ID does not exist, return 404

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the order to cancel was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order with ID '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:name: Found — cancel order
otherwise.doc:description: Order found, update status to CANCELLED and return the modified record

ee:transform.doc:name: Set status to CANCELLED
ee:transform.doc:description: Applies the CANCELLED status to the order record while preserving all other fields

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 200 OK

logger.doc:name: Log cancel order
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the order cancellation operation

flow.name: delete-order-flow
flow.doc:name: Delete Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Permanently deletes an order record by ID. Returns 204 No Content on success, 404 if not found.

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Receives DELETE requests to permanently remove an order by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures the orderId URI parameter into a flow variable

ee:transform.doc:name: Check order exists
ee:transform.doc:description: Verifies the order ID exists in mock data before performing the delete

choice.doc:name: Order exists?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the order ID to delete exists in mock data

when.doc:name: Not found
when.doc:description: Order ID does not exist, return 404

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 404 Not Found

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 404 error body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON error response indicating the order to delete was not found

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Not Found", message: "Order with ID '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404 }

otherwise.doc:description: Order found, simulate deletion and return 204 No Content

set-variable.doc:name: Set 204 status
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response status to 204 No Content

set-payload.doc:name: Empty response body
set-payload.doc:description: Sets empty payload for 204 No Content response

logger.doc:name: Log delete order
logger.doc:description: Logs the result status of the order delete operation
